narrative: UK GDP beats estimates at 0.5% mom, driving GBP/USD higher at 1.3558; EUR/USD holds at 1.1792 as Goldman Sachs pushes back ECB rate hike timing. USD/JPY trading at 158.92, while AUD/USD firms to 0.7179 on RBA hiking bias. Equities rise +0.80%, gold higher +0.39% on mixed sentiment, VIX at 18.0.
